init.title: Data Synchronisation Settings
init.description:
Genesis Energy Electricity and GAS data is often delayed by 24-48 hours.

**Daily Auto-Correction**
When enabled, this integration will perform a special synchronisation every day after **1:00 PM**. It will re-download and **overwrite** the statistics for the last few days to fill in gaps and correct temporary estimates provided by Genesis.

Enable this if you see missing data or inconsistencies in your Energy Dashboard.
